race.description: Greg Cribb Memorial Red Crown 2Yo Hcp
race.comment: SAMBUCA SKY (10) handy filly resuming. Showed good early speed on debut when third over 900m at Scone last January. Back with the two slick trial wins and will prove hard to stop despite drawing out. TIGRIS POWER (12) Tiger Of Malay filly from Power Of Wexford on debut for the Kris Lees yard. Has shown enough in her two trials to suggest she can take a hand in the finish. OLE STEELE (9) made her debut in a very strong contest with a fading twelfth over 1100m in the LR Woodlands Stakes at Scone two weeks ago. Can improve sharply here and relish the conditions. THE BREAKERS (3) was no match for an impressive maiden winner at Newcastle but still stuck on gamely to hold third. Better for that and is worth respecting.
